description.en: The world's largest nocturnal primate, famous for its unusually long, thin middle finger.
description.zh: 世界上最大的夜行性灵长类动物，以其异常细长的中指而闻名。

anatomy.en: They have large ears like bats and teeth that grow forever like rodents. Their middle finger is very bony and flexible.
anatomy.zh: 它们长着像蝙蝠一样的大耳朵，牙齿像啮齿动物一样不断生长。它们的中指只有骨头，非常灵活。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They use their middle finger to tap on trees to find grubs. This technique is called 「percussive foraging」.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们用中指敲击树干来寻找幼虫，这种技巧被称为「敲击觅食法」。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to the island of Madagascar, living in rainforests and deciduous forests.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 马达加斯加岛特有，生活在热带雨林和落叶林中。
